title: 10-15-20 — haunted-house dream
html:
TL;DR

  • Oct 15 2020, 7:30am Apple Note from 18-year-old Yahir in GP, mid-pandemic: a one-sentence dream journal entry — "Just had a dream before I checked out my new house in the early morning. That the house was expansive as shut, but many things weren't to my liking. Confusing disattached, haunted, creep as fuck."
  • The dream-house is expansive but wrong — confusing, disattached, haunted, creep as fuck. Negative-affect house dream the morning of an actual house viewing. Anxious-anticipation form, not a premonition form.
  • "Checked out my new house in the early morning" — context for the mom house by the river thread? In Oct 2020 Yahir is still living in GP — the "new house" could be a planned move (pre-OSU) or his mom's house-hunt he's tagging along on. Vault doesn't yet specify.
  • "Expansive as shut" — possible typo for "as shit"; either way the contrast between size and wrongness is the dream's signal: scale ≠ home.
  • Sibling form to other dream journal entries; specifically the house-as-self / house-as-future category later picked up in mom house by the river aspiration notes.

Source quote

"Just had a dream before I checked out my new house in the early morning. That the house was expansive as shut, but many things weren't to my liking. Confusing disattached, haunted, creep as fuck"

Open questions

  • Whose new house — Yahir's, his mom's, both? The Oct 2020 housing context is missing in vault.
  • Did the actual house-viewing later that morning match the dream's negative affect, or did he like it?
  • Is this the earliest dated dream-as-pre-event check in the corpus? It pairs cleanly with dad death premonitions formally — sleep-state output indexed to a coming real-world moment.
